lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨਾ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵਨੀ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: sabh sidh saadhik mun janaa man bhaavanee har dhiaaeo |
lines.english: All the Siddhas, seekers and silent sages, with their minds full of love, meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਲੀ ਗਉੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: maalee gaurraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Maalee Gauraa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਰੰਪਰੋ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਹਰਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਲਖਾਇਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aparanparo paarabraham suaamee har alakh guroo lakhaaeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God, my Lord and Master, is limitless; the Guru has inspired me to know the unknowable Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਨੀਚ ਮਧਿਮ ਕਰਮ ਕੀਏ ਨਹੀ ਚੇਤਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: ham neech madhim karam kee nahee chetio har raaeo |
lines.english: I am low, and I commit evil actions; I have not remembered my Sovereign Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਮਸਤਕੇ ਧੁਰਿ ਲੀਖਿਆ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: prabh masatake dhur leekhiaa guramatee har liv laaeo |
lines.english: Such is the destiny God wrote on my forehead; following the Guru's Teachings, I enshrine love for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਨਿ ਮੇਲਿਓ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਖਿਨੁ ਬੰਧ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਰਾਇਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har aan melio satiguroo khin bandh mukat karaaeo |1|
lines.english: The Lord has led me to meet the True Guru; in an instant, He liberated me from bondage. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਸਬਦ ਦਰਗਹ ਬਾਜਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਓ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਗਾਇਓ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: panch sabad daragah baajiaa har milio mangal gaaeo |2|
lines.english: The Panch Shabad, the five primal sounds, vibrate and resound in the Court of the Lord; meeting the Lord, I sing the songs of joy. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਰਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਭਾਗੀਆਂ ਨਹੀ ਭਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: patit paavan naam narahar mandabhaageean nahee bhaaeo |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the Purifier of sinners; the unfortunate wretches do not like this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਗਮ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨ ਮਨੁ ਮੈ ਲਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: mat dehi har prabh agam tthaakur gur charan man mai laaeo |
lines.english: Please bless me with such understanding, O Inaccessible Lord God, my Lord and Master, that my mind may remain attached to the Guru's feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇ ਗਰਭ ਜੋਨੀ ਗਾਲੀਅਹਿ ਜਿਉ ਲੋਨੁ ਜਲਹਿ ਗਲਾਇਓ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: te garabh jonee gaaleeeh jiau lon jaleh galaaeo |3|
lines.english: They rot away in the womb of reincarnation; they fall apart like salt in water. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੈ ਰਹਉ ਲਾਗੋ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਓ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: har raam naamai rhau laago jan naanak naam samaaeo |4|3|
lines.english: Servant Nanak remains attached to the Name of the Lord; he is merged in the Naam. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਮਲ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ਭਇਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿਓ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਭਾਗਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kamal pragaas bheaa gur paaeaa har japio bhram bhau bhaagaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My heart-lotus has blossomed forth, and I have found the Guru. Meditating on the Lord, my doubts and fears have run away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਲੀ ਗਉੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: maalee gaurraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Maalee Gauraa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਸਿ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: meraa man raam naam ras laagaa |
lines.english: My mind is addicted to the juice of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਲਾਗੋ ਮੇਰਾ ਹੀਅਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਸੋਇਓ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਜਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bhaae bhagat laago meraa heearaa man soeo guramat jaagaa |
lines.english: In the Fear of God, my heart is committed in loving devotion to Him; following the Guru's Teachings, my sleeping mind has awakened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਸੁੰਭੁ ਹੈ ਕਚੂਆ ਜਿਉ ਕੁਸਮ ਚਾਰਿ ਦਿਨ ਚਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh rang kasunbh hai kachooaa jiau kusam chaar din chaagaa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is like the false color of the safflower, which fades away; its color lasts for only a few days.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਖੀਨ ਭਏ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਆਈ ਹਰਿ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿਓ ਵਡਭਾਗਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kilabikh kheen bhe saant aaee har ur dhaario vaddabhaagaa |1|
lines.english: All my sins have been erased, and I have found peace and tranquility; I have enshrined the Lord within my heart, by great good fortune. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਇ ਪਰਤਾਪੈ ਡੰਡੁ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਕਾ ਲਾਗਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: khin meh binas jaae parataapai ddandd dharam raae kaa laagaa |2|
lines.english: He perishes in an instant; he is tormented, and punished by the Righteous Judge of Dharma. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕਾਪਰੁ ਚੀਰ ਬਹੁ ਫਾਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਲਹੈ ਸਭਾਗਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kaapar cheer bahu faare har rang na lahai sabhaagaa |3|
lines.english: The cloth of the body may be torn to shreds, but still, this beautiful color of the Lord's Love does not fade away. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਾਧ ਅਤਿ ਗੂੜੀ ਜਿਉ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਜੀਠ ਬਹੁ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat preet saadh at goorree jiau rang majeetth bahu laagaa |
lines.english: The Lord's Love, found in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, is absolutely permanent, and colorfast.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਾਰ੍ਹਿਓ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੋਭਾ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਚਲੂਲੈ ਰਾਂਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: har chaarhio rang milai gur sobhaa har rang chaloolai raangaa |
lines.english: Meeting with the Blessed Guru, one is dyed in the color of the Lord's Love, imbued with this deep crimson color.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਪਖਾਰੈ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨੀ ਜਨੁ ਲਾਗਾ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: jan naanak tin ke charan pakhaarai jo har charanee jan laagaa |4|4|
lines.english: Servant Nanak washes the feet of that humble being, who is attached to the feet of the Lord. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਲੀ ਗਉੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: maalee gaurraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Maalee Gauraa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਭਜੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: mere man bhaj har har naam gupaalaa |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate, vibrate upon the Name of the Lord, the Lord of the World, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਲੀਨੁ ਭਇਆ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੈ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਰਾਮ ਰਸਾਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: meraa man tan leen bheaa raam naamai mat guramat raam rasaalaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My mind and body are merged in the Lord's Name, and through the Guru's Teachings, my intellect is imbued with the Lord, the source of nectar. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਕੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੀਖਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਬਨਮਾਲਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jina kai masatak leekhiaa har miliaa har banamaalaa |1|
lines.english: Those who have such destiny inscribed upon their foreheads, meet with the Lord, adorned with garlands of flowers. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਮਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramat naam dhiaaeeai har har man japeeai har japamaalaa |
lines.english: Follow the Guru's Teachings, and meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. Chant, and meditate, on the beads of the mala of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑ ਜਮੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਖਵਾਲਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tina jam nerr na aavee gur raakhe har rakhavaalaa |2|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not even approach them; the Guru, the Savior Lord, saves them. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਤਿਨੑ ਚੂਕੇ ਸਰਬ ਜੰਜਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: jina har naam dhiaaeaa tina chooke sarab janjaalaa |
lines.english: Those who meditate on the Name of the Lord - all their entanglements are ended.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਅਗਨਿ ਨਿਤ ਮੇਲਤੇ ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kar maaeaa agan nit melate gur raakhe deen deaalaa |3|
lines.english: I continually put my hands into the fire of Maya, but the Guru saves me; He is merciful to the meek. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਬਾਰਿਕ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਣਹੂ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: ham baarik kichhoo na jaanahoo har maat pitaa pratipaalaa |
lines.english: I am a child; I know nothing at all. The Lord cherishes me, as my mother and father.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਮੈਲੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਹੋਇਆ ਸਭ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਹਰਿ ਜਸਿ ਜਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: bahu maile niramal hoeaa sabh kilabikh har jas jaalaa |
lines.english: I was filthy, but I have become immaculate. Singing the Lord's Praises, all sins have been burnt to ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਅਨਦੁ ਭਇਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਾ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: man anad bheaa gur paaeaa jan naanak sabad nihaalaa |4|5|
lines.english: My mind is in esctasy, having found the Guru; servant Nanak is enraptured through the Word of the Shabad. ||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਲੀ ਗਉੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: maalee gaurraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Maalee Gauraa, Fourth Mehl:
